72170.title: Hollywood's Best Film Directors: Dennis Dugan
72170.description: Regisseur Dennis Dugan is gespecialiseerd in komedies en met name die met Adam Sandler, zoals 'Happy Gilmore', 'Big Daddy', 'I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry', 'You Don't Mess with the Zohan', 'Jack and Jill' en 'Grown Ups'.
